payload.title: RT Lowering: attribute-internal call-like syntax matched as fn call
payload.description: clap derive's #[command(subcommand)] attribute syntax is parsed as a fn call by trust-lower's named-arg pass, matching trust_std::process::command and demanding named-arg form. Surfaced during the RT-47 rename when trust-std signature index had . Fix: lowering pass must skip token streams inside #[...] / #![...] attributes.
